product_depth.justification: All 6 agent files are genuine thin wrappers with consistent structure. Matches anchor 4: strong with minor issues.

functionality.justification: No content lost. All key sections verified present in role files. Shared pre-flight in SKILL.md. Matches anchor 4.

visual_design.justification: Markdown formatting consistent across files. Acceptable baseline for refactoring. Matches anchor 3.

code_quality.justification: Clean separation of concerns. Single source of truth applied correctly. Matches anchor 4.

contract_checks.evidence: Each agent file is 16-21 lines with YAML frontmatter + read-role-file instruction + ownership

Key sections verified in role files via grep: Loop Per Round, Release, Skepticism, Browser Testing, Feature Acceptance, Sprint Round Sequence, Authenticity Checklist, Required Outputs, Migration Check, Manifest Synchronization
All 5 command files contain 'Command Pre-Flight Validation from SKILL.md'
Command files: 305 -> 273 lines (reduction: 32). Functional goal met despite lower-than-estimated reduction.

non_blocking_issues: F-002 line reduction (32) is less than the estimated 100 lines. The shared State Validation block was ~6 lines per file, not ~20. The functional requirement (shared pre-flight) is fully met.

feature_evidence.reason: All 6 agent files are thin wrappers (118 total lines, down from 435). All unique content merged into role files. No content lost.
Shared Command Pre-Flight Validation added to SKILL.md. All 5 command files reference it instead of inline duplication.

tests_written: structural verification via grep and wc -l

non_blocking: F-002 line reduction lower than estimated but functional goal achieved

internal_consistency.justification: All agent files follow identical thin wrapper pattern. All command files use identical pre-flight reference pattern.

intentionality.justification: Each agent file was individually analyzed for unique content before simplification. Role file merges were targeted, not bulk copies.

craft.justification: YAML frontmatter preserved exactly. Markdown structure consistent. File paths valid for plugin.json.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Agent files clearly direct to role files. Command files clearly reference shared pre-flight. No ambiguity in the delegation chain.
